summary: Iteration 153: PMS Decomposition Stage 1 + CI/CD Hardening - All tests passed. 59 route wiring tests, 17 outbox tests, 14 API tests verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Stage 1 decomposition successfully extracted rooms (9 routes) and guests (5 routes) from pms.py into pms_rooms.py and pms_guests.py
Router registry correctly includes pms_rooms and pms_guests routers (lines 32-34)
All 59 PMS routes are wired and return non-404 status codes
CI guards pass: check_orphan_files.py (19 root files in allow-list), check_import_boundaries.py (3 known exceptions tracked)
Ruff check passes with W and C4 rules enabled (zero violations)
Outbox pattern tests pass with correct patch target (core.outbox_worker.get_system_db)
Booking API requires Idempotency-Key header for POST /api/pms/bookings
Guest API requires phone and id_number fields for POST /api/pms/guests

success_rate.backend: 100% - 90/90 tests passed (59 route wiring + 17 outbox + 14 API)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 153 verified PMS decomposition Stage 1 and CI/CD hardening. Key tests: (1) 59 PMS route wiring regression test - all routes return non-404, (2) Room CRUD API (POST/GET/PUT /api/pms/rooms) - all pass, (3) Guest CRUD API (POST/GET/PUT /api/pms/guests, GET /api/pms/guests/search) - all pass, (4) Booking API (POST/GET /api/pms/bookings) - pass with Idempotency-Key header, (5) Companies route (GET /api/pms/companies) - pass, (6) CI guards (check_orphan_files.py, check_import_boundaries.py) - both pass, (7) Ruff check with W+C4 rules - zero violations, (8) 17 outbox pattern tests - all pass with patched get_system_db. STRICT_TENANT_MODE=true is active.

test_classes: TestDashboardAPIs (2 tests) - Dashboard and operational alerts

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries and actual CI guard scripts.
